hero_eyebrow: Power your business with AI & Cloud!

about_bio: Polyglot software engineer with 10+ years of experience building applications across multiple platforms and languages. AI expert across ChatGPT, Claude, and CoPilot, with a passion for helping businesses leverage technology to grow.
trust_2: Design, build & hosting in one place
services_intro: Pick what fits your business. Pricing follows the scope below, so you get a quote built around your project, not a fixed package.
card_web_intro: From a simple one-page site to a full online store, built and ready to grow.
card_web_b1: Static pages or a dynamic, content-managed site
card_web_b2: DNS and hosting with us, or on your own account
card_web_b3: Custom design matched to your brand
card_web_b4: Online store, bookings, or calendar features
card_web_b6: Fast and mobile-friendly on every device

card_gbl_b1: New profile setup or a cleanup of an existing one
card_gbl_b3: Photos, hours, and services done properly
card_gbl_b5: Guidance to earn reviews and rank higher
card_android_intro: Your business in the Play Store, built for phones and tablets.
card_android_b6: Play Store account setup and publishing
card_ios_intro: A polished iPhone and iPad app, ready for the App Store.
card_ios_b6: Apple Developer setup and App Store publishing
app_b_scope: Scoped to the screens and features you need
app_b_push: Push notifications to reach your users

card_ai_b2: Chatbots trained on your own material
card_content_intro: Eye-catching visuals that keep your brand looking sharp and consistent.
services_foot: Not sure where to start? Tell us a little about your business and we will point you the right way.
why_c1_body: From AI-powered learning tools to smarter day-to-day workflows, we bring practical AI into the parts of your business that actually benefit from it.
why_c2_body: Websites, apps, and tools hosted and run in the cloud — reliable, accessible anywhere, and ready to scale as your business grows.
why_c3_title: Pricing scoped to what you need
why_c3_body: No blanket packages — you get a quote based on the actual shape of your project, not a one-size-fits-all rate card.
faq_q1: How long does a typical project take?
faq_a1: It depends on scope — a simple listing or one-page site might be ready within a week; a full app usually takes a few weeks. You'll get a timeframe before any work starts.
faq_q2: Do you handle hosting, or do I need my own hosting account?
faq_a2: Either works. I can host things for you start to finish, or set it up under your own account if you'd rather keep ownership of it.
faq_q3: Can I select more than one service?
faq_a3: Yes — pick as many as apply. One message covers everything you're interested in, and you'll get a single reply addressing all of it.
faq_a4: It depends on what you need, so quotes aren't generic. Send a message with a rough idea and you'll get a straight answer back.
